note: Sprint 5.31 Trinity Scientific Task Classifier v0.1: inserts a deterministic, local, no-LLM classifier layer between intake and task builder. scripts/trinity/scientific_task_classifier.py reads a Sprint 5.20+ intake artifact (bounded previews only, 1024 chars per field) and emits a classification JSON with task_kind (comparison/extraction/validation/benchmark), confidence (low/medium/high), candidate_materials (regex against a hand-curated formula table: CeO2/PrOx/Sm2O3/Y2O3/ZrO2/TiO2/MgO/Al2O3/Fe2O3/SiO2/La2O3), candidate_metrics (named metric substrings PLUS csv headers lifted from Sprint 5.29 csv reader structured_summary), proposed_source_tool (materials_engine when task is comparative/benchmarking AND materials detected; else trinity_scientific_prompt_intake), proposed_difficulty_class (benchmark+8docs->high, comparison/benchmark+2mats->medium, else low; extreme reserved for operator override), expected_output_schema, public_description, warnings, evidence (bounded 200 chars per item, 16 items max), threat_refs (T01/T04/T09). Three signals fired -> high confidence; two -> medium; fewer -> low + warning. classification_id = sha16(canonical({intake_id, pinned_time, task_kind, materials, metrics})) — deterministic. Schema schemas/trinity/scientific_task_classification.schema.json ($id=trinity-scientific-task-classification/v0.1) locks every pattern + enum + length cap. New schema. useful_compute_task_builder.py gains --from-scientific-classification PATH + --intake-json PATH (both required); builder cross-checks classification.source_intake_id == intake.intake_id AND classification.source_intake_sha256 == sha256(intake_file), refuses rc=2 on mismatch. Resulting request carries THREE metadata blocks: scientific_intake (Sprint 5.21), scientific_reader_manifest (Sprint 5.30), scientific_task_classification (Sprint 5.31; bulky evidence stays in the classification file, only decision-shape lands in request). task_type forced to scientific_intake regardless of proposed_source_tool so worker contract stays identical. Request schema useful_compute_request.schema.json gains new OPTIONAL scientific_task_classification property under metadata; request schema $id unchanged (additive; pre-Sprint-5.31 requests still validate). --difficulty-class relaxed from required=True to optional, validated post-parse (legacy + intake-bridge paths still require it). The classifier NEVER reads any document file — only the intake artifact. NEVER opens the network. NEVER imports anthropic/openai/langchain/transformers/llama_cpp. Static safety test forbids every wallet/private_key/seed_phrase/mnemonic/passphrase/ecdsa/secp256k1/sign_tx/sign_transaction/real_sign/sendrawtransaction/broadcast/sost-cli/sost_cli token, every shell/subprocess primitive, every stdlib network primitive, every mutating-fs op, plus the four named LLM client libraries. Cross-check safety re-asserts that Sprint 5.31 did NOT regress Sprint 5.29 intake or Sprint 5.30 task builder safety surfaces. Sentinel-poison privacy test: a document body with a 100-fold repeated sentinel string never produces more than 2 copies in the classification output (preview + maybe one re-quote — full-text leakage would push the count far higher). Tests: 1247 passed, 39 skipped on the deployment host (1204 prior + 43 new = 22 functional + 12 schema + 9 safety). Manual demo over the Sprint 5.29 final 5-document intake: classification_id=scl-<id>, task_kind=comparison, confidence=high, candidate_materials=[CeO2,PrOx], candidate_metrics=[compound, oxygen_storage_capacity, oxygen_storage_mmol_g, temperature, temperature_c], proposed_source_tool=materials_engine, proposed_difficulty_class=medium. The classifier-derived request runs through task_queue.py enqueue + run-once cleanly with governor_decisions_count=7 and watchdog_safety_status=ok. Non-goals for v0.1 (documented): no LLM, no network, no document I/O (only intake.json), no new source_tool/task_type enum values, no automatic task creation, no materials_engine routing override of task_type. Pure scripts+schemas+docs+tests merge: zero src/, zero consensus changes, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes.
